name: Butter Pecan Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 3 tablespoons butter in a 13x9x2 inch baking pan. Stir in pecans, and bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Cool.
2. Cream softened butter in a large mixing bowl; gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy and all sugar is dissolved. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; add to creamed mixture alternately with milk, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Stir in vanilla and 1 cup pecans, reserving remaining pecans for Butter Pecan Frosting.
4. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 9-inch cake pans. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool layers in pans for 10 minutes; remove from pans and cool completely.
5. Spread top and sides of cooled cake with Butter Pecan Frosting.
Yield: one 2-layer cake.
Butter Pecan Frosting:
1. Cream butter until smooth.
2. Add sugar, milk, and vanilla, beating until light and fluffy. Stir in reserved toasted pecans.
Yield: enough frosting for one 2-layer cake.
